metadata.lyrics:
[00:32.74] (Oh, here she comes)

[01:05.14] She'll only come out at night
[01:07.59] The lean and hungry type
[01:10.50] Nothing is new, I've seen her here before
[01:15.85] Watching and waiting
[01:18.24] She's sitting with you but her eyes are on the door
[01:23.35] 
[01:26.61] So many have paid to see what you think you're getting for free
[01:32.03] The woman is wild, a she-cat tamed by the purr of a Jaguar
[01:37.56] Money's the matter, if you're in it for love you ain't gonna get too far
[01:45.07] 
[01:48.35] Oh, here she comes
[01:50.75] Watch out boy, she'll chew you up
